context: Evaluates whether the agent uses rego.metadata.rule() to access rule annotations at runtime and embeds the severity from custom metadata into the structured violation output.

checklist.name: METADATA block with custom.severity
checklist.description: The deny/violations rule has a `# METADATA` annotation block with a `custom: severity:` field

checklist.name: Uses rego.metadata.rule() at runtime
checklist.description: The rule body calls `rego.metadata.rule()` (or `rego.metadata.chain()`) to read its own annotation at evaluation time

checklist.name: Violation is a structured object with severity
checklist.description: The violation output is a structured object containing both a `message` field and a `severity` field populated from the runtime annotation (not hardcoded)

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
